task_completion.description: Change body text to 12pt Times New Roman and set line spacing to Double
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the formatting toolbar or character/paragraph dialogs for 'Times New Roman' and size '12'. Visually, the text should appear double-spaced, or the line spacing setting should show 'Double' (200%).

task_completion.description: Set 1-inch margins on all sides and enable continuous line numbering
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the page ruler for 1-inch margins (grey areas at the edges). Look for continuous line numbers running down the left margin of the document text.

task_completion.description: Add running header with specific text and centered page numbers in footer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top and bottom of the pages. The header should contain 'Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries' and the footer should have a centered page number.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' to 7 main sections and 'Heading 2' to 6 subsections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the section titles. The formatting toolbar or Styles pane should indicate 'Heading 1' for main sections (e.g., Abstract, Introduction) and 'Heading 2' for subsections when selected.

task_completion.description: Format 25 reference entries with a 0.5-inch hanging indent
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the References section. The entries should have a hanging indent where the first line is flush left and subsequent lines are indented by 0.5 inches (visible on the ruler or in paragraph settings).

task_completion.description: Save the formatted manuscript to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar for 'manuscript_formatted.odt' or a Save As dialog confirming the path '/home/ga/Documents/manuscript_formatted.odt'.

integrity.description: Agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OpenOffice Writer application interface, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to modify the file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python scripts, sed, or other command-line tools being used to edit the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent used built-in formatting features rather than manual typing
integrity.visual_evidence: Line numbers, headers, footers, and indents should be applied using OpenOffice settings/menus, not by manually typing numbers at the start of lines or pressing the spacebar repeatedly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/Documents/manuscript_draft.odt' and the output file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/manuscript_formatted.odt'. The running header text must be exactly 'Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries'. There are 7 main sections requiring 'Heading 1' style (Abstract, Introduction, Materials and Methods, Results and Discussion, Conclusions, Acknowledgments, References) and 6 subsections requiring 'Heading 2' style. All 25 reference entries must be formatted with a hanging indent.
